plain_english_summary: Deterministic hand-joint transport codec for XR two-hand streams with private-stage release posture.
commercial_wedge: Deterministic hand transport for XR platforms: sub-millisecond latency (0.057 ms mean encode+decode), byte-identical replay, and mixed-gesture packet transport on the current ContactPose lane. Compression is real, but the current public wedge is transport behavior, not release-ready comparator displacement.
technical_wedge: Deterministic two-hand joint codec. Current public lane: 0.479 mm MPJPE, 23.90× compression vs raw, 0.057 ms mean encode+decode latency, 0/5 modern-comparator gate, verdict PRIVATE_ONLY.
ideal_first_buyer: XR platform team or spatial-computing infrastructure team
deployment_model: SDK — Python package candidate with evaluation harness
not_claimed: Public release readiness (modern comparator gate not closed)
Unity or Meta runtime closure (XR-C007 PAUSED_EXTERNAL)
family_position: Product candidate in the Zer0pa deterministic encoding family; evaluated as an independent lane surface.
